'''Balowa''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Balowa system/Legends|Balowa system]] whose primary terrain was rainforest. This planet was the location of a duel in which the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Kaox Krul]] and [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Crian Maru]], along with her [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Dree Vandap]], were killed in [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], shortly before the start of the [[Ruusan campaign]].<ref name="Darkness Shared" />

{{Planet-stub}}
